tool_autonomous_edit: Execute an AI-powered video editing intent on the Lazynext timeline. Accepts natural language prompts like 'cut silences', 'add crossfade', 'apply cinematic color grade'.
tool_transcribe: Transcribe video/audio using Whisper with speaker diarization.
tool_edit_transcript: Edit video by editing its transcript text. Remove words/sentences to cut the corresponding video segments.
tool_remove_fillers: Remove filler words (um, uh, like, you know) from the timeline.
tool_remove_silences: Remove silence gaps from the video timeline.
resource_timeline: Current timeline state including tracks, clips, and keyframes.
prompt_cut_silences: Prompt to cut all silence gaps in the current project.
prompt_add_music: Prompt to add background music to the project.
prompt_export: Prompt to export the project in a specific format.
error_run_command: Failed to run command. Check if the API gateway is running on port 8005.
